Become a

Verified Owner

Build Trust, Get More Bookings

Prove to guests you are who you say you are by showing them we have verified your property ownership and contact details.

Get a Verified Owner online certificate displaying your property and status to your guests.

Use your Verified Owner certificate with all of your marketing efforts, from any source.

Becoming a Verified Owner is an important step in building trust with your guests.

It shows them that you are a real property owner advertising a genuine property. It gives them the confidence to make a booking knowing they are communicating with the right person.

Want product news and updates?

Sign up for our newsletter.

We care about your data. Read our privacy policy.

Get Your Verified Owner Certificate

Your Verified Owner certificate shows we have verified you, your property ownership, and your contact details.

Help Guests Avoid Scams

Verification gives guests peace of mind that they are not dealing with fake property profiles and scammers.

Boost Your Marketing

Link to your certificate wherever you deal with guests so it benefits all of your marketing efforts, no matter the source.

Frequently Asked Questions:

If you have a specific question that's not answered on this page or below then just send us a message and we’ll get right back to you.

Is getting verified difficult?
Not at all. Simply upload your documents through our secure upload page and we will begin the verification process. If we need any further information we will email you to request it.
What documents do you need?
To verify your identity we need a copy of a government ID along with a selfie. For property ownership verification we need to check your land registry certificate and a utility bill.
Do you only check documents that I have uploaded?
No, we will also look at other aspects of your property such as map locations, reviews and listings on other websites, and reverse image searches. This helps build a clearer picture of your property status.
My property is held in a business name, can I still verify?
Yes, we would simply need to see the business incorporation documents proving your ownership alongside all the standard verification documents.
Will my uploaded documents be secure?
Yes, the upload process is fully encrypted and all uploaded files are stored on an encrypted and secure drive. Once we have verified your documents they will be securely deleted from our servers.
How long does verification take?
We aim to complete most verifications within a few days however in some cases it may take up to a week to complete.
Will guests see my documents?
No, we will never share your documents with guests, they will only be used for initial verification purposes and then deleted once checked.
How much does becoming a Verified Owner cost?
Other similar services like this available elsewhere which are priced between £200 - £450 a year however we are offering this free to all of our listing website customers!
Do I have to become a Verified Owner?
No, it is not a requirement to list on our websites however we strongly encourage it. Building trust with guests is crucial to securing bookings and become verified shows that you are committed to building that trust.
Can I become a Verified Owner if I don't list with you?
If you're not currently a customer of ours then simply get in touch with us and we can discuss options to carry out a Verified Owner check for you and your property.
